0.q: Overexpression of the white clover gene TrHSFB2a in Arabidopsis significantly reduced fresh and dry weight, RWC, maximum photosynthesis efficiency and performance index, while it promoted leaf senescence, REC and MDA contents compared to wild type under drought, heat and salt stress.

1.q: Aux/IAA proteins are short-lived nuclear proteins that bind with auxin response factors (ARFs) to prevent their activation in the absence of auxin, thereby acting as repressors of ARFs.
